function.name: pc_key_press
function.description: Press a key or key combination on the PC keyboard. Modifiers and main key are joined with '+', e.g. 'ctrl+c', 'alt+f4', 'shift+tab'. Single keys: return, escape, backspace, tab, space, delete, home, end, pageup, pagedown, up, down, left, right, f1–f12, or any single character.
